zh.lifeSummary: 當William Blake於1465年出生在英國維爾爾卡爾內時，他的父親William Blake27歲，母親Alice29歲。他於1484年與Mary Coles在英國哈普爾安多福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年3月10日在英國哈普爾安多福享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾安多福。

nameMeanings.name: Blake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (England and central Scotland): variant of Black 1, meaning ‘swarthy’ or ‘dark-haired’, from a byform of the Old English adjective blæc, blac ‘black’, with change of vowel length.

English: nickname from Middle English blak(e) (Old English blāc) ‘wan, pale, white, fair’. In Middle English the two words blac and blāc, with opposite meanings, fell together as Middle English blake. In the absence of independent evidence as to whether the person referred to was dark or fair, it is now impossible to tell which sense was originally meant.
English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English bleik, blaik>, blek(e) (Old Norse bleikr) ‘pale or sallow’ (in complexion).

variants.name: Bleak
meanings: English: mostly a variant of   Blake  , but perhaps also of   Blick  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Black
meanings: English and Scottish: chiefly from Middle English blak(e) ‘black’ (Old English blæc, blaca), a nickname given from the earliest times to a swarthy or dark-haired man. However, Middle English blac also meant ‘pale, wan’, a reflex of Old English blāc ‘pale, white’ with a shortened vowel. Compare Blatch and Blick . With rare exceptions it is impossible to disambiguate these antithetical senses in Middle English surnames. The same difficulty arises with Blake and Block .
Scottish: in Gaelic-speaking areas this name was adopted as a translation of the epithet dubh ‘dark, black-(haired)’, or of various other names based on Gaelic dubh ‘black’, see Duff .

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames directly or indirectly derived from the adjective meaning ‘black, dark’, for example German and Jewish Schwarz and Slavic surnames beginning with Čern-, Chern- (see Chern and Cherne ), Chorn-, Crn- or Czern-.

variants.name: Blaikie
meanings: Scottish: nickname from a pet form of   Blake  .

variants.name: Blakes
meanings: English: variant of Blake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Blake was born in 1465, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, his father, William Blake, was 27 and his mother, Alice, was 29. He married Mary Coles in 1484, in Andover, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 10 March 1547, in Andover, Hampshire, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Andover, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Blake est né en 1465, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Blake, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary Coles en 1484, à Andover, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1547, à Andover, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Andover, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1484 in Andover, Hampshire, England Mary Coles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. ja.lifeSummary: William Blakeが1465年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンで生まれた時，父William Blakeは27歳，母Aliceは29歳であった。1484年にイギリスハンプシュアイアアンドバーでMary Colesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年3月10日にイギリスハンプシュアイアアンドバーで82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアアンドバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Blake(이)가 1465년 영국 윌츠히르 캘니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Blake(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1484년 영국 함프실르 앤도버에서 Mary Coles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 3월 10일 영국 함프실르 앤도버에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 앤도버에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Blake родился в 1465 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Blake было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Coles в 1484 г. в местности андовир, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 марта 1547 г. в местности андовир, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности андовир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.
